**Infrastructure Operations Log Summary**

Completed multiple operations across services (billing-worker, report-builder, session-manager, webhook-relay, search-indexer, cache-warmer, audit-logger, metrics-collector, ingest-api, user-profile-service, scheduler-core, payment-gateway, notification-daemon, export-pipeline, auth-service) spanning environments: dev sandbox, QA cluster, green/blue pools, staging, canary, production.

Operations included: scaling, upgrading, patching, migrating, rolling back, reconfiguring, draining, resuming, inspecting, pausing, health-checking, redeploying. Outcomes: mostly ahead-of-schedule, completed without errors, cleared alerts, stabilized error rates, some manual retries needed. Follow-up config cleanup tasks filed; thresholds flagged for review.
